"E:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\devinsight_backend.dir/objects.a
E:\vscode\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\devinsight_backend.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\devinsight_backend.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\vscode\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\devinsight_backend.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o devinsight_backend.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdevinsight_backend.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\devinsight_backend.dir\linkLibs.rsp
